title: Application of dynamic accuracy evaluation for press systems based on orthogonal design method
author: Wang

steps.title: Orthogonal design method
steps.instruction: Due to the effects of manufacturing quality on the dynamic accuracy are obvious, the working condition and structure parameters are selected to the influence factor. Meanwhile, the repeat accuracy, the deviation position value and the mean square error are chosen to the evaluation element. The level structure of dynamic accuracy is built, as shown in Fig. 2. Based on the orthogonal design method, the orthogonal table (Ln(rm)) is established, which would consider the effect degree and interaction of factors. The orthogonal analysis table is given in Table 1. The difficult changed factor should be considered in the first order number. Then, the simulation project is conducted and the weight coefficient of factors is obtained. In addition, the analysis and evaluation of dynamic accuracy for press systems are performed, which would provide the reference for the design of production.Fig. 2The level structure of dynamic accuracy.Fig 2Table 1Orthogonal analysis table.Table 1Case numberAiBiCi12⋯n
